name: Aradhya
role: Chairman, Vidarbha Cotton Growers FPC, Maharashtra
quote: We had been trying to register our FPC for two years with no success. Mujanti completed the entire registration in six weeks and then enrolled us in a carbon program. We received our first payment of ₹4.2 lakhs this season.

name: Savitri Devi
role: CEO, Bundelkhand Women Farmers FPC, UP
quote: The website and member tracking software changed everything. Our board can see every farmer's crop cycle, input costs, and delivery schedule from their phone. We used to do all of this on paper — now everything is in one place.

name: Dinabandhu Majhi
quote: I did not know what a carbon credit was one year ago. Today our FPO earns from the trees we planted — money that goes directly to 520 tribal families. They explained everything in Odia and walked with us at every single step.
